summary: India-Pakistan war happened in 2025. Tariffs hit 50%. FIIs pulled out $22 billion. And STILL — Nifty closed positive for the year. Meanwhile, people are panicking about global investing and Silver. Kirtan Shah has some very direct things to say — and most of it goes against what the internet is telling you.

Welcome & Introduction of Kirtan Shah
Why Is Everyone Talking About Global Investing?
The Real Return Data: India vs World (Dollar Terms)
Nifty: 10 Years, Zero Negative Years — Think About That
South Korea 80% Last Year, But 5-Yr Average Is 2.2%
Why India Actually Underperformed in 2025
India-Pakistan War Happened. Market Was Still Positive.
Who Should Do Global Investing (And Who Shouldn't)?
Radhika Gupta's Take: Global Investing Is For Whom?
Metals Alert: Why Gold & Silver Exploded
Russia-Ukraine, Sanctions & the De-Dollarization Story
Silver's Rise — AI, EVs, Solar: The Real Demand Case
Warning: Silver's Last Leg Was 100% Speculation
The 7–9 Year Gold/Silver Cycle You Need to Know
Why Gold Still Belongs in Your Portfolio
What HNI Clients Are Actually Asking Kirtan Right Now
Asset Allocation: The ONLY System That Works
In 41 of 45 Years, Market Fell 10% Intra-Year
Volatility Is a Feature, Not a Bug
Your Risk Profile + Time Horizon = Your Strategy
Why Asset Allocation Is Really Behavioural Management
Time Solves Most Investment Problems
Strategy for 3 Types of Investors
Young Investor (Zero Corpus): Start With Flexi Cap
Mid-Career Investor: Large Cap + Small Cap Opportunity
Near-Retirement Strategy: SWP & Hybrid Funds
Macros Are for Fund Managers — Not Retail Investors
The Simple Test: Can You Explain It to Your Spouse?
2026 Outlook: Kirtan Is Bullish on India
The Contrarian Bet: Mid-Cap IT Right Now?
Closing Advice for First-Time Listeners
Final Formula: 80% Equity + 20% Gold = Life Solved

tool.label: Asset Allocator
tool.reason: How much of your money belongs outside India? Put in your numbers and see how big an international sleeve makes sense.
